description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a matte black bezel. The front features a vibrant screen displaying an anime character, surrounded by a uniform, medium-thick bezel with sharp corners and no visible decorative elements. The monitor is supported by a geometric, polygonal pedestal stand that appears sturdy and stable, with a central column connecting the base to the display. The rear of the monitor is plain and unadorned, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding, and the side profile reveals a slim, slightly tapered body. The overall construction suggests a modern, utilitarian design typical of office or home computer monitors, with a hard plastic exterior and likely internal electronic components. The surface finish is smooth and matte, minimizing glare and reflections.
description: A modern, matte black flat-panel computer monitor with a polygonal pedestal stand and a medium-thick bezel, featuring a smooth, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a medium-thick black bezel and a polygonal pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim, tapered profile and the central support column of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unmarked back panel with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the monitor's thinness and the angular shape of the stand base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is medium-thick, matte black, with sharp corners and a flat, uniform surface. It lacks any decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a polygonal pedestal type with a wide, angular base and a central support column, all in matte black plastic. No visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
